title: Xautoを呼び出して
summary_text: **Findings (severity order)** - **Critical:** default Kernel runner still hard-requires Claude in baseline matrix and validation, so Claude-free default path is currently blocked. [run-kernel-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh:98) [run-kernel-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh:107) [run-kernel-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh:116) - **High:** local orchestration defaults/gates still assume Claude and can fail a Claude-free run as high-risk even when Codex+GLM lanes are healthy. [run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh:13) [run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh:546) [run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh:550) [run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh:918) [run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh:924) - **High:** missing-lane reporting is hardcoded to `Codex/Claude/GLM`, which will misreport intentional Claude removal. [run-kernel-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh:281) - **Medium:** optional specialist lanes are supported by matrix builder, but local runner currently forces `gemini/xai` off, so “GLM + optional specialists” is not truly enabled by default path. [build-agent-matrix.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh:124) [run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh:613) - **Medium (regression risk):** existing tests/docs are Claude-coupled and will fail after Claude-free default unless updated. [test-run-kernel-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/tests/test-run-kernel-orchestration.sh:138) [test-run-kernel-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/tests/test-run-kernel-orchestration.sh:281) [test-kernel-context-governor.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-context-governor.sh:17) - **Workflow invariant callout:** single-lane fallback is a workflow violation and must remain blocked. Current guards correctly enforce multi-lane quorum; do not relax them during migration. [run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh:274) [run-kernel-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh:296) **Minimum tests that must pass** 1. `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/tests/test-run-kernel-orchestration.sh` 2. `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/check-agent-matrix-parity.sh` 3. `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-local-orchestration-consensus-bridge.sh` 4. `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-consensus-evidence.sh` 5. `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-vote-launchers.sh` 6. `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-vote-handoff-simulation.sh` 7. `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-context-governor.sh` (if docs/wording change) **Progress report** 目的（Claudeなし既定ローカルKernelオーケストレーション）への達成度は **約35%**。 このレビューで設計リスクは特定済みで、到達まで **約4スライス**（実装変更 → テスト更新 → 回帰実行 → smoke証跡確認）です。 今回は依頼どおり**ファイル編集は未実施**です。
